channel.title: Stress on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Stress on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: Depressive and Anxious Symptoms, Experimentally Manipulated Acute Social-Evaluative Threat, and Cortisol
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine depressive and anxious symptoms, experimentally manipulated acute social-evaluative threat, and cortisol. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper You can access the full paper here.

item.title: Monitoring Stress Among Internal Medicine Residents: An Experience-Driven, Practical and Short Measure
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine monitoring stress among internal medicine residents. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper You can access the full paper here.
